signatureMethod: Digitally signed via Carevo Clinical Review Portal

clusters.name: A — Mild upper respiratory
clusters.decision: C — approve downgrade to home_care WITH CONDITIONS
implementation: Root cause fixed deterministically: rawUrgentCareSafetyFloor fluLikeSystemic pattern matched 'fever' inside negated clauses ('no fever'); fever component now tested on negation-stripped text (route.ts).

Calibration boundary terms for home_uri_cold_without_lower_respiratory_flags and home_mild_pharyngitis_without_red_flags extended with Paul's conditions: fever (any), short of breath, and >7-day duration phrasings (promote-calibration.ts, re-promoted as batch-3 artifact).

clusters.name: B — Pediatric eczema & post-cold conjunctivitis
clusters.decision: C — approve downgrade to home_care WITH CONDITIONS via downward-guarding deterministic rules

eczema: facial or airway swelling explicitly absent
conjunctivitis: sudden vision change or loss explicitly absent

implementation: lib/engine/homeGuard.ts (carevo-home-guards-2026.07.16-paul-batch3): raw-text guards paul3_pediatric_flexural_eczema and paul3_postcold_conjunctivitis. Fail-closed semantics: any danger AFFIRMED blocks; minimum count of EXPLICIT denials required (silence is not absence); never over emergency; skipped when any raw-text ER/urgent floor matched. Kill switch HOME_GUARDS=0.

clusters.name: C — Safety rules vs benchmark labels
clusters.decision: B — engine is right; keep ER safety rules unchanged; correct benchmark labels
clusters.notes: AMBIGUOUS - GO TO ER TO BE SAFE. Eye triad (glaucoma/uveitis risk) and severe recurrent vertigo (central neuro risk) keep their ER floors. Labels corrected ne->em in synthetic-240-benchmark.jsonl with label_note attribution.
